title: Modern Christmas Party Supplies (Mini Christmas Tree Honeycomb Decorations - 3ct)
features: (3) Mini Christmas Tree Honeycomb Table Decorations
One 10" tree, one 6.8" tree, and one 5" tree
This Modern Christmas party tableware is perfect for hosting an elegent Christmas party or Holiday party.
Pair with other Modern Christmas tableware and decorations to complete your party theme.
